message:
chore(robot): remove dead code detectAgentTypeFromTitle

Remove unused function detectAgentTypeFromTitle and its test.
This function was superseded by detectAgentType in robot.go which
properly maps short codes (cc, cod, gmi) to full names (claude, codex,
gemini). The dead code was only called from its own test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
